name: Portage Salarial - Single filer, high revenue
description: Consultant earning €100,000 annual revenue through portage salarial company (8% fee), net after fee and all deductions

sources.description: Verified using official French tax formula with portage salarial (8% fee). Revenue: €100k. Portage fee: €8,000. Gross after fee: €92k. Social contributions and income tax calculated on €92k. Taxable income: €76,653.48. Tax on quotient: €16,100.03.
